'''Saber 1''',<ref name="CCG" /> also designated as '''Saber Leader''',<ref name="Pocketmodels">{{SWPM|set=Base Set|cardname=Saber Leader TIE Interceptor|link=http://www.swpocketmodels.com/images/ship06b.jpg}}</ref> was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]<ref name="CCG" /> manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].<ref name="DB" /> Saber 1 had the serial number 000004, and also bore a [[Bloodstripe (symbol)|bloodstripe]], representing a minimum of ten [[Death/Legends|kills]].<ref name="CCG" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] take place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. {{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Saber 1}} is concurrent to the events of ''Return of the Jedi''; therefore, its [[in-universe]] [[Standard year/Legends|year]] is also 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].</ref> Saber 1 was assigned to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing's]] [[Saber Squadron (Imperial)/Legends|Saber Squadron]]. The [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptor]] was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Baron of the Empire/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]],<ref name="CCG" /> the leader of the 181st Imperial Fighter Wing.<ref name="CCG2">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Baron Soontir Fel}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Saber 1 was created in [[2000]] for the ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. Of note, the image used to represent Saber 1 is an edited version of<ref name="CCG" /> a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE/IN]] interceptor production image.<ref name="SWC 242">''[[Star Wars Chronicles]]''</ref> In [[2007]], the [[Star Wars PocketModel TCG: Base Set|''Base Set'']] of the ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG]]'' included Saber 1, giving it the alternate name of Saber Leader.<ref name="Pocketmodels" />
